gate_action: Sets this point completeness sub-score = 0. FLAG: GCP_POINT_FLIGHT_GAP.
threshold_summary: coverage_ratio=1.0 AND pre>=120s AND post>=60s -> 100; coverage=1.0 AND pre>=60s -> 88; coverage=1.0 AND pre<60s -> 72; coverage<1.0 -> 0 + gate.

device_type=DGPS: completed_normally AND 0 shutdowns AND battery_min>=20% -> 100; shutdown>=1 -> 30; oplog absent/null -> 60 (unconfirmed); download not confirmed -> advisory flag.  device_type in {CB_X, AEROPOINT, OTHER}: oplog expected-absent, no penalty for absence; score based on RINEX signals (any_gap_gt_60s=False -> 100; else 40).
version supported AND header complete AND dual-freq -> 100; single-freq -> 70; version unsupported -> 35 (FLAG: GCP_POINT_RINEX_VERSION_UNSUPPORTED); header incomplete -> 40.
no gaps AND <5 slips -> 100; minor gaps OR 5-20 slips -> 75; any_gap_gt_60s OR >20 slips -> 40. Feeds disturbance composite.

gate_action: Sets this point setup sub-score = 0. FLAG: GCP_POINT_ANTENNA_HEIGHT_MISSING.
threshold_summary: antenna_height_auto_known=True (CB_X / AEROPOINT) -> 100 by definition (factory-known).  device_type=DGPS: VERTICAL AND measured_to=ARP AND count>=3 AND RINEX agreement -> 100; single VERTICAL -> 88; SLANT -> 72; height entered but RINEX delta_h disagrees -> 55 (review).  No height entered (DGPS / OTHER) -> 0 + gate.
Match -> 100; mismatch -> 50 + FLAG: GCP_POINT_DEVICE_ID_MISMATCH (HIGH, reviewer-blocking); either side missing -> 60 (unconfirmed).
Match -> 100; mismatch -> 40 + FLAG. Type-string consistency only, NOT a true ANTEX calibration check (that is Stage 2).
multipath_risk_level low (<=2.5 dB-Hz) -> 100; moderate (2.5-4.0) -> 65; high (>4.0) -> 35 + FLAG: GCP_POINT_HIGH_MULTIPATH. Risk proxy, not error magnitude.
Kp <= 4 OR dual-freq available -> 100; Kp 5-6 AND single-freq -> 60; Kp >= 7 AND single-freq -> 40 + FLAG: GCP_POINT_IONO_RISK. External NOAA SWPC dependency.
